summary: Plan-only PR remediation classification for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are proposed because closure/comment/label are blocked and no PR has the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR, but merge preflight is incomplete and relevant checks are not clean. Recommend repair on the contributor branch rather than merge in this plan run.
Likely useful and nearly ready, but merge_candidate requires Codex /review proof plus resolved review/bot comment evidence. Plan a maintainer-safe repair/finalization pass rather than merge now.
Useful contributor PR with good proof and clean visible checks, but missing required Codex /review merge preflight. Plan a finalization repair pass before merge.
Small, focused, and likely finalizable, but merge preflight is incomplete. Plan a narrow finalization pass with Codex /review and targeted validation before merge.

Contributor branch can be repaired because maintainer_can_modify=true, but the PR is waiting on author, has a broad gateway availability-sensitive diff, and has unresolved review/check blockers. Plan repair rather than merge.
Create one executable repair/finalization artifact covering the five contributor PRs, with branch repair first and replacement PRs only if a branch cannot be safely repaired.

needs_human: #90745 requires maintainer judgment after repair because it overlaps #89428 and extends the runtime reply metadata contract beyond the narrower hidden-runtime-context fix.
#90653 requires maintainer judgment if the waiting-on-author state or current-main watcher conflict cannot be resolved with a narrow branch repair.
